name: runic-skills
description: 145 AI & Dev skills via @runic — type @runic /skill-name in VS Code Copilot Chat. Code review, debug, tests, refactor, docs, agents, security, LLM cost, and more.
author: Diottodev

chatParticipants.name: runic
chatParticipants.description: 145 AI & Dev skills. Type /skill-name to invoke. E.g. @runic /code-review

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, and quality

commands.name: debug-error
commands.description: Diagnose errors and stack traces, find root cause

commands.description: Generate unit tests (Arrange/Act/Assert)
